title: XSS vulnerability via unescaped verbatim HTML
description: Tweet content rendered via Karax verbatim without HTML escaping. Arbitrary JavaScript injection possible.
recommendation: Use text instead of verbatim, or HTML-escape before rendering

title: No Content-Security-Policy or security headers
description: Zero security headers: no CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, HSTS.
recommendation: Add security headers in Jester routes

title: Plaintext session credentials
description: Twitter OAuth tokens and auth_token/ct0 stored unencrypted in sessions.jsonl.

title: Hardcoded default HMAC key
description: Default HMAC key is 'secretkey' in config. Used for media URL signing.
recommendation: Enforce key change in production config

title: 42% community health
description: No CONTRIBUTING, no CODE_OF_CONDUCT, no SECURITY.md.

title: OpenSSF score 4.2/10
description: 0/10 on Code-Review, Token-Permissions, CII, Security-Policy, Fuzzing, Branch-Protection, SAST.

title: Broad exception catch-all in API utils
description: Generic Exception catch converts unknown errors to RateLimitError, masking bugs.

title: 184 open issues on effectively legacy project
description: Core functionality broken by Twitter API changes. Repo maintained but not actively developed.
recommendation: Consider archiving or documenting legacy status

title: Excellent Docker hardening
description: Read-only fs, CAP_DROP ALL, non-root (uid 998), alpine minimal, health checks. Best in T29 corpus.

title: Parser versioning for API evolution
description: Experimental module allows parallel parser development for evolving Twitter API.
recommendation: Architecture reference for unstable upstream APIs
